summary: Top-3 buy candidate PRQR (6.67, above the 6.25 line) is sitting on a confirmed $59M dilution that just closed 6/26 -- intel graded it 'info not flag' and missed it; separately 4 of 5 held names carry live dilution/distribution overhangs (UUUU $300M ATM, NTSK post-lockup VC selling, WRAP $200M baby-shelf, CAI data-quality price drift).

WRAP.note: $200M universal S-3 baby-shelf on file for a sub-$100M post-+48%-pump name = standing drip-dilution capacity; no confirmed 424B5/ATM draw yet, position +$1.08 at $2.11. Note: cache price stale (7/8 $1.555 vs broker $2.11) per nightly audit -- stop math referencing cache is off, though broker is account of record.

UUUU.note: Active $300M ATM (equity distribution agreement 2026-06-13) is a real ongoing dilution mechanism; Lorentzian k-NN reads -0.75 bearish and position -$1.21. CEO Bhappu $968k (7/7) + chairman Hansen (7/8) insider buys do not offset the ATM overhang.

CAI.note: Fundamentals clean (director $990k buy 7/13, Caris Detect launch, $100M buyback, no dilution). Raised a notch: nightly audit flags broker_disagrees (broker $17.50 vs cache $16.99, 3.0% drift, held ticker) -- live P&L fine but stop math off the cache is wrong. Data issue, not fundamentals.

NTSK.note: Book's best gainer +$5.45/+7.2% at $14.12, breakout catalyst (Wells Fargo/Jefferies/Cantor Buy) intact, but post-IPO-lockup VC distribution is ongoing: Lightspeed XII sold 219,075sh 7/9 (~$2.7M) after the 7/8 sale, atop a ~1.65M-sh Lightspeed director sale mid-June. Iconiq's $7.2M 7/8 buy only partly offsets; net VC flow is distribution.

YEXT.note: No shelf/ATM/dilution filing; failed Feb-2026 take-private replaced by an anti-dilutive $140M self-tender buyback. Position +$0.93, no fresh negative catalyst.

flags.why: Top-3 buy candidate (6.67) but management just diluted ~30%: a $50M underwritten registered direct offering (27,624,310 sh at $1.81) plus a $9.2M Lilly private placement (5,100,780 sh) priced 6/25 and closed 6/26, and a 7/6 F-3 resale prospectus registers a further 3,030,303 PIPE shares for resale. Stock now $1.72, BELOW the $1.81 offer price; the CEO's $1.59 7/7 insider buy that drives the score came AFTER the raise. Not the clean insider fundamental the 6.67 implies.

Top-of-radar candidate (6.7) but 12-for-1 reverse split effective TODAY (7/14) purely for Nasdaq $1 bid-price compliance (Rule 5550(a)(2)), on top of a pump into an unfunded 'AI + blockchain + crypto/stablecoin' pivot; shares whipsawed +130%/-39%/+27%. Reverse-split-plus-crypto-pump, not a fundamental insider catalyst.

Top-3 candidate (6.6) with a textbook pump-and-dump signature: HK event-management microcap ran ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 intraday (6/16) then collapsed to ~$3.53. Extreme two-way volatility, no fundamental driver; the insider-driven score should be rejected by the pump veto.

On intel/research watchlist purely on the Equinor $1B+ backlog story, but a pending ~$5.8B all-stock acquisition of Valaris (15.235 RIG sh per Valaris sh) dilutes existing holders to ~53% of the combined company and the terms are drawing legal scrutiny -- a material dilution plus binary shareholder-vote event the 'clean backlog' framing omits.

Watchlist candidate that priced a $100M underwritten offering (13,495,277 sh at $7.41) on 6/24 -- real dilution alongside the ABS-201 Phase 1 catalyst; ~$10.07 now sits above mean analyst PT. Keep flagged so it is not bought as a fresh breakout.

Distressed reverse-merger pop, not organic strength: definitive Serapha Bio merger plus $230M concurrent private placement leaves pre-merger holders only ~3.7% of the combined entity; oncology pipeline halted, ~75% workforce cut. Still on today's scan (2.06) with a -3.0 internal penalty.

Most recent 10-Q discloses going-concern doubt including possible Chapter 7 liquidation; just closed a $23.7M private placement (warrant overhang). Still surfaced on scan; FinBERT -0.288 on the cash-runway story.

Scan candidate (2.96, below threshold) with severe dilution overhang: ~167M shares out, active $300M S-3 shelf, 13.95M warrants, authorized shares hiked to 450M. Phase 2 news constructive but capital structure unresolved; desk avoid.
Automatic S-3ASR shelf effective 2026-01-13, already used twice via 424B5, plus an active $50M ATM -- ongoing drip-dilution setup. On today's scan (1.83) with a -1.5 internal penalty.

On today's scan (1.79) but distressed: down ~91% YoY near 52-wk lows despite a token insider buy, 10-for-1 reverse split this cycle tied to Nasdaq compliance, pivoting into Dogecoin mining hardware -- distress signal, not a turnaround.
Live $100M ATM (since 2024) plus a Feb-2026 $107.6M underwritten offering (20M sh at $5.00), now underwater near $3.73-3.83. Desk avoid list; not held, not a current scan candidate.

dilution_watch.note: $50M underwritten registered direct offering (27,624,310 sh at $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly private placement (5,100,780 sh); closed 6/26. Effective F-3 shelf remains; 7/6 F-3 registers 3,030,303 PIPE sh for resale.
$300M at-the-market equity distribution agreement, actively usable now for this producer; held position, no new confirmed July draw found.
~$5.8B all-stock acquisition of Valaris (15.235 RIG sh per Valaris sh); existing RIG holders diluted to ~53% of combined co, terms under legal scrutiny.
$100M underwritten offering, 13,495,277 sh at $7.41; ~$6.08/sh immediate dilution.
Definitive Serapha Bio merger plus $230M concurrent private placement; existing holders diluted to ~3.7% pro forma.
$300M shelf plus 13.95M warrants; authorized shares hiked to 450M -- severe overhang.
$23.7M private placement; going-concern disclosure in most recent 10-Q.
Automatic shelf effective, used twice via 424B5; $50M ATM active.
$200M universal baby-shelf on file for a sub-$100M post-pump name; no confirmed 424B5 draw yet but standing dilution capacity.
12-for-1 reverse split effective today for Nasdaq $1 bid-price compliance -- corporate action that desyncs ledger vs broker; not a fundamental catalyst.
$107.6M underwritten offering now underwater; $100M ATM remains active.

disagreements: PRQR: intel graded PRQR 'info not flag' and noted only 'an F-3 shelf plus a 7/6 resale prospectus for 3,030,303 sh,' MISSING the confirmed $59M raise that priced 6/25 and closed 6/26 -- a $50M registered direct (27,624,310 sh at $1.81) plus a $9.2M Lilly private placement. This is a top-3 BUY candidate (6.67, above the 6.25 line) whose insider-cluster score is built on a CEO buy made AFTER management diluted holders ~30% at a price ($1.81) now above the market ($1.72). Should be a flag, not info.

RIG: intel/research keep RIG on the watchlist framed purely on the Equinor $1B+/7-rig-year backlog, but neither mentions the pending ~$5.8B all-stock Valaris acquisition that dilutes existing holders to ~53% of the combined company and is drawing legal challenge -- a material dilution and binary-vote risk under a 'clean' watchlist name.

NTSK: intel reads net insider flow as 'mixed, not one-directional' on Iconiq's $7.2M buy, but the sell side is larger and ongoing -- Lightspeed XII sold 219,075sh 7/9 after the 7/8 sale, plus a ~1.65M-sh Lightspeed director sale mid-June; post-lockup VC distribution is a live overhang the 'no negative news' read understates.

WRAP: intel repeats 'no new offering/ATM/shelf found,' but a $200M universal S-3 baby-shelf IS on file -- on a sub-$100M post-pump name that is standing dilution capacity, so 'no dilution mechanism' overstates the all-clear even without a confirmed 424B5 draw.

Discipline (carried): radar.html execution checklist shows weekly buy budget 9/4 used -- the book is well over the 4-buy weekly cap; surface as a standalone overtrading flag independent of any single ticker.
